description: Checked no-Tokio boundary for default, metrics, and fuzz feature graphs.

production_guarantees.proof_command: rch exec -- cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync -i tokio
rch exec -- cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync --features metrics -i tokio

quarantined_tokio_carrying_profiles.proof_command: rch exec -- cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync --features fuzz -i tokio
quarantined_tokio_carrying_profiles.rationale: The fuzz feature enables OTLP protobuf wire helpers through opentelemetry-proto gen-tonic-messages. This is not part of the default or metrics production graph.

readme_must_state: The optional `metrics` feature also has no normal-edge dependency on tokio
The `fuzz` feature is intentionally outside this guarantee
agents_must_state: The optional `metrics` feature also has no normal-edge dependency on tokio
forbidden_stale_claims: no-tokio guarantee does not yet extend to that feature
